# OPS-SAT operating-point oracle — scikit-learn 1.8.0 / numpy 2.4.1 on REAL
# ESA OPS-SAT-AD test split (Ruszczak et al. 2025, Zenodo 10.5281/zenodo.12588359,
# CC BY 4.0). Consumed by tests/ai_ml_rf_impairment_detection_evaluation_reference.rs.
# See generate_opssat_opcurve_reference.py for full provenance + independence note.
# Format:
#   META n_test n_anom n_channels
#   CHANNELS <name:n_total:n_anom> ...   (per-channel totals, for the breakdown)
#   DETECTOR <name>
#   LABELS  l,l,...        (0/1 per test segment, test-split order)
#   CHAN    c,c,...        (channel per test segment, same order)
#   SCORES  s,s,...        (detector score per test segment, f64 repr, same order)
#   AUC     <roc_auc_score>
#   OP <target_pfa> <threshold> tp fp tn fn pd pmd pfa precision accuracy f1
#   PC <target_pfa> <channel> <n_anom_in_channel> <n_detected> <per_channel_pd>
#   ENDDET

DETECTOR combined
